items.title: Resource suggestion: free Layoff Recovery Action Plan Generator
items.description:
Hi! I built a free no-login Layoff Recovery Action Plan Generator that may fit job-search/career transition resources:

https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/layoff-recovery-action-plan-generator/

It helps recently laid-off job seekers turn the first week into a calm plan: proof inventory, warm outreach, recruiter brief, and focused applications. Companion paid kit: https://cleo-ai-ops.github.io/client-intake-autopilot-pack/layoff-recovery-sprint-kit/

Happy to adjust wording/category if useful.
